dsl_rule.translation_notes: Converted 'multiday range breakout' to Donchian channel upper band (dc_upper) as the closest available indicator for range-based breakouts. 'Price and 20MA rising above 200MA' translated to two separate conditions: close > sma_200 and sma_20 > sma_200. Exit condition (AUTHOR_SILENT) interpreted as a reversal signal: close crossing below sma_200. Hold period set conservatively to 5 days based on 'multiday' language in source material.

backtest_rule.reason: Converted 'multiday range breakout' to Donchian channel upper band (dc_upper) as the closest available indicator for range-based breakouts. 'Price and 20MA rising above 200MA' translated to two separate conditions: close > sma_200 and sma_20 > sma_200. Exit condition (AUTHOR_SILENT) interpreted as a reversal signal: close crossing below sma_200. Hold period set conservatively to 5 days based on 'multiday' language in source material.

source_rule_text: Enter a long trade when price and 20MA line are rising above the 200MA line while breaking out above a multiday range.
